summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification over hydrated preflight state. No GitHub mutations, merge, fix, or raise_pr actions are permitted by job frontmatter. Open PRs are classified independently; closed linked/context refs are either quarantined for security handling or kept closed as historical context.
